evals.prompt: Set up orchestra for this project
evals.expected_output: Folder structure created, README.md updated with Brief section template, ADR-000 written, templates written. No questions asked.
assertions: README.md ## Brief section contains a Vision field
README.md ## Brief section contains an Audience field
Scaffold report instructs user to fill in Brief and run /orchestra-roadmap
Skill asked no questions during execution

evals.prompt: Set up orchestra for this project (when .orchestra/ already exists)
evals.expected_output: Skill detects existing .orchestra/ directory, reports what is there, and stops without creating or overwriting anything.
assertions: Skill lists what is present in the existing .orchestra/ directory
Skill does not create any new files
Skill does not overwrite any existing files

evals.prompt: Set up orchestra for this project (when README.md already exists with no Brief section)
evals.expected_output: Existing README.md is appended with a Brief section template. Existing content is preserved.
assertions: ## Brief section is appended to the end of README.md
## Brief section contains Vision and Audience placeholder fields
README.md was not overwritten — original content still present
